objective: Investigate and resolve recurring scheduler job failures
background: 6 JobRunLog entries with status=failed in the last 24h across: training:tw-worker-cycle, training:tw-self-audit. Silent failures leave the pipeline in an unknown state.
constraints: Do not disable jobs without operator approval
Do not modify trading thresholds or strategy parameters
Do not require live broker connection
acceptance_tests: Root cause identified and documented for each failed job: training:tw-worker-cycle, training:tw-self-audit
Fix applied or retry mechanism improved
JobRunLog shows 0 failures for the same jobs in the next 24h window
required_outputs: Root cause identified and documented for each failed job: training:tw-worker-cycle, training:tw-self-audit
Fix applied or retry mechanism improved
JobRunLog shows 0 failures for the same jobs in the next 24h window
forbidden_changes: Do not disable jobs without operator approval
handoff_questions: Did you verify each acceptance criterion with evidence?
